category_sources: Official docs https://www.promptfoo.dev/docs/intro/ describe promptfoo as an open-source CLI and library for evaluating and red-teaming LLM apps.
source_facts.description says it tests LLM apps locally.
display_name_sources: Official site https://www.promptfoo.dev/ and GitHub repository use the display name promptfoo.
docs_sources: Official Promptfoo documentation is hosted under https://www.promptfoo.dev/docs/.
repo_sources: Official Promptfoo site links to GitHub for the open-source project.
Official verified GitHub organization https://github.com/promptfoo controls promptfoo.dev and lists promptfoo as the main project.
tags_sources: Official docs https://www.promptfoo.dev/docs/intro/ describe evaluations, red teaming, and CLI/library usage.
source_facts.description says it tests LLM apps locally.
